reason: Management's FY2025 LFL perimeter excludes An Khang and AvaKids and includes Thợ Điện Máy Xanh; this comparator does not overwrite the statutory actual.
Only the disclosed management-adjusted headline is bridged; no unsupported allocation is made to EBIT, working capital or cash flow.
No sufficiently granular disclosure exists to normalize the statutory operating-profit line across the perimeter change.
Minimum operating cash is not disclosed; cash-like balances are not automatically classified as excess cash.
Lease and debt conventions are not sufficiently disclosed for a supported adjusted-net-debt figure.
